packet_markdown:
# Line Lofts building packet

## Snapshot
- Building ID: line-lofts-1737-n-las-palmas-ave
- Address: 1737 N Las Palmas Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90028
- Primary URL: https://www.thelinelofts.com/
- Management company: WSI Management, LLC
- Recommended status: research_complete
- Last updated: 2026-03-22

## Scorecard
- Quiet: 4 (medium, evidence count 2)
- Management: 3 (low, evidence count 1)
- Amenity: 4 (medium, evidence count 2)
- Community stability: 3 (low, evidence count 1)
- Location fit: 4
- Pricing transparency: 3

## Risks
- Structural noise risk: unknown
- Location noise risk: medium
- Security risk: low
- Pricing risk: medium

## Evidence summary
- [official] The official position is that the building sits on a quiet street just off Hollywood Boulevard. Source: Line Lofts official site (https://www.thelinelofts.com/). Note: Current official materials emphasize a quiet street off Hollywood Boulevard.
- [review] Apartments.com currently shows only studio inventory, along with reduced rates and one-month-free offers. Source: Apartments.com (https://www.apartments.com/line-lofts-hollywood-ca/rspqcx2/). Note: Public listing showed studios only and current specials on March 22, 2026.
- [review] Zumper continues to show controlled access, on-site maintenance, on-site management, and gated covered parking. Source: Zumper (https://www.zumper.com/apartment-buildings/p182500/the-line-lofts-hollywood-hills-west-los-angeles-ca). Note: Zumper highlights controlled access, on-site maintenance, on-site manager, and gated covered parking.

## Open questions
- Recheck 1BR availability, package handling, and parking details.

## Notes
Research complete. The side-street location is a real positive for quiet risk, but the current public inventory looks studio-heavy and the building should not move further until one-bedroom availability is confirmed.
